astral.commandConfused: ⚠️ I got confused. Try shorter: "upgrade Miya to 5", "open a rare chest".
astral.customLlmHint: Turn on — otherwise the API key is not used.
astral.guide.inGameHint: Where to paste in game: main menu → ✨ Astral icon → ⚙️ AI → "Custom neural network (LLM)" → provider {{provider}} → model → "API key" → "Test connection".
astral.guide.openai.step1: Open platform.openai.com and log in (Log in / Sign up).
astral.guide.openai.step10: In Model use the name without provider prefix, e.g. gpt-4o-mini or gpt-4.1-mini.
astral.guide.openai.step11: Paste your OpenAI key in API key.
astral.guide.openai.step12: Click Test connection. On success your model works in chat, battle tips, notifications and autoplay.
astral.guide.openai.step2: In the left menu pick API keys or open platform.openai.com/api-keys.
astral.guide.openai.step4: Enter a name, e.g. Starfall, and click Create secret key.
astral.guide.openai.step5: Copy the key — it starts with sk-…. Click Copy. Shown once — save it.
astral.guide.openai.step6: Check Billing: without balance or a card, API requests will fail.
astral.guide.openai.step7: In game open Astral chat (✨) → ⚙️ AI in the chat header.
astral.guide.openrouter.step1: Open openrouter.ai in your browser (the button below opens the keys page).
astral.guide.openrouter.step10: In Model enter e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini (catalog at openrouter.ai/models).
astral.guide.openrouter.step11: Paste the copied key in API key (Ctrl+V on PC or long-press → Paste on phone).
astral.guide.openrouter.step12: Click Test connection. If you see ✅ — Astral uses your model in chat, battle, menu and autoplay.
astral.guide.openrouter.step2: Top right, click Sign in or Log in (Google, GitHub or email).
astral.guide.openrouter.step3: After login open Keys: avatar → Keys, or go to openrouter.ai/keys.
astral.guide.openrouter.step4: Click Create Key (or Create API Key).
astral.guide.openrouter.step5: Name the key, e.g. Starfall, and confirm.
astral.guide.openrouter.step6: Copy the full key — it starts with sk-or-v1-…. Click Copy. The full key is shown once — save it.
astral.guide.openrouter.step7: In game open Astral chat (✨ on main screen) → ⚙️ AI in the chat header.
astral.guide.subscriptionNote: Star Guardian subscription required. Key stays in this browser on this device only.
astral.guide.subtitle: Step by step: where to click on the site and what to paste in the game
astral.guide.title: 📖 Guide: custom AI

brawler.goro.attackDesc: Goro spins 360°, striking all enemies within 90 units with both axes—450 damage each. 2 charges, 1.5s cooldown. In a group of 3 enemies that's 2700 total damage across two spins. Best melee AoE in the game—jump into the center and double-tap.
brawler.goro.description: A huge bearded man with two battle axes
brawler.goro.lore: Goro is a mountain barbarian who came down from the northern peaks. He doesn't remember his childhood, but he remembers the taste of victory. He forged his twin axes himself, and no shield has survived two of his strikes in a row.
brawler.goro.name: Goro
brawler.goro.superDesc: Goro enters berserker rage for 5 seconds: +40% movement speed and +50% damage per hit (450 × 1.5 = 675 per spin). In rage mode Goro can catch any enemy. Combo: pop Super → dive in → two spins = 1350 damage to one target in 3 seconds.
brawler.hana.attackDesc: Hana fires a pink bullet (400 unit range) with dual mode: aim at an ally—heals 150 HP; aim at an enemy—deals 150 damage. 4 charges, 0.9s cooldown. At peak fire rate: 600 HP/sec to an ally or 600 damage/sec to an enemy—among the best DPS and heal numbers.
brawler.hana.description: A girl in a pink medical coat with a healing pistol
brawler.hana.lore: Hana is a frontline medic from the Rose Hospital. Her pistol heals allies and pierces enemy armor equally well. She believes kindness and strength can go hand in hand and has never given up on a hopeless patient.
brawler.hana.name: Hana
brawler.hana.superDesc: Hana creates a blooming garden with 160 unit radius for 5 seconds. Allies inside gain 200 HP/sec healing (up to 1000 HP) and +20% movement speed. Hana can keep shooting inside or outside the garden. Ideal for slow tanks—greatly boosts survivability under fire. Pairs well with Ronin or Goro.
brawler.kenji.attackDesc: Kenji fires a lightning bolt (200 unit range) that chains: first target—250 damage, second within 130 units—175 (70%), third—120 (48%). 2 charges, 1.3s cooldown. In tight groups one shot can deal up to 545 total damage.
brawler.kenji.description: A guy in a yellow suit with electric shockers on his hands
brawler.kenji.lore: Kenji is a brilliant inventor expelled from university for "experiments that were too dangerous." His tasers are built from old vending machine parts, and lightning jumps between enemies like it's alive. He fights to prove he was right.
brawler.kenji.name: Kenji
brawler.kenji.superDesc: Kenji creates an electric cage with 110 unit radius for 5 seconds. All enemies inside take 200 damage/sec from shock (up to 1000 total) and are slowed 50%. The cage is visible—force enemies to stay and burn or exit into ally fire at the edges.
brawler.miya.attackDesc: Miya quickly throws 3 shuriken in a fan: the center flies straight for 220 units, the side ones at ±15° from aim. Each deals 400 damage on hit (up to 1200 total if all three connect). 3 attack charges, 1.2s cooldown. Great for blocking a lane or finishing a target with a tight spread before retreating.
brawler.miya.description: A purple-haired ninja girl; throws three shuriken in a fan pattern in battle
brawler.miya.lore: Miya grew up in a hidden village of shadow blades. After a hostile clan destroyed her home, she swore to deliver justice alone. She throws three shuriken in one volley—they rarely miss—and training in teleportation made her the Arena's fastest assassin.
brawler.miya.name: Miya
brawler.miya.superDesc: Miya instantly teleports behind the nearest enemy within 400 units, lands an empowered strike, and applies -40% slow for 2 seconds; she gains +20% speed for 1 second. Use Super → three attack charges of triple shuriken (up to 9 projectiles in a row) to finish targets.
brawler.rin.attackDesc: Rin throws a poisoned dagger (300 unit range): 350 damage on hit + poison for 3 seconds (100 damage/sec = 300 DoT). 650 total from one throw. 3 charges, 1.0s cooldown. Poison doesn't stack—a new throw refreshes the timer. Best strategy: keep poison uptime and finish with daggers.
brawler.rin.description: A girl with green hair and poisoned daggers
brawler.rin.lore: Rin grew up in green jungles among poisonous plants. Each dagger is coated with a personal venom no one else knows how to make. She appears silently, poisons her target, and vanishes into the brush before anyone can react.
brawler.rin.name: Rin
brawler.rin.superDesc: Rin throws a poison grenade, creating a 100 unit cloud for 4 seconds. All enemies inside take 150 damage/sec (up to 600 total). Combo with daggers: grenade poison + dagger poison = double damage over time. The cloud is subtle—enemies may not notice until the first tick.
brawler.ronin.attackDesc: Ronin swings his katana in a wide 60° cone in front of him (160 unit range). Deals 300 damage to each target hit. 2 charges, 1.4s cooldown—you can land 2 hits in a row (up to 600 to one target). The closer the enemy, the higher the chance both hits connect.
brawler.ronin.description: A massive samurai in red armor with a katana
brawler.ronin.lore: Ronin was once a general in the imperial army. Betrayed by his own lords, he donned old armor and became a ronin. His katana cuts stone, and his shield withstands volleys from a dozen rifles.
brawler.ronin.name: Ronin
brawler.ronin.superDesc: Ronin raises an armored shield for 5 seconds: incoming damage is reduced by 50%, and 30% of absorbed damage is reflected back to the attacker. Speed drops 15%, but katana attacks continue. Ideal for soaking group fire—reflected damage adds up.
brawler.sora.attackDesc: Sora launches a fireball (400 unit range): direct hit—300 damage + 60 unit radius blast—150 damage to everyone nearby. Up to 450 to one target in the epicenter. 3 charges, 1.1s cooldown. Against groups each shot hits multiple targets with the blast—strong area control.
brawler.sora.description: A boy in a blue robe with a floating spellbook
brawler.sora.lore: Sora is a court mage exiled for daring to study forbidden star runes. His floating book whispers ancient formulas, and meteor showers scar the Arena itself.
brawler.sora.name: Sora
brawler.sora.superDesc: Sora calls down 5 meteors in a chosen zone over 3 seconds. Each meteor: 250 impact damage + 70 unit radius blast (extra damage). Up to 1250 total to one target. Impacts scatter randomly in a 120 unit circle from aim. Strong vs dense groups holding cover or a capture point.
brawler.taro.attackDesc: Taro delivers a heavy wrench blow (80 unit range): 400 damage to the main target + 80 damage to all enemies within 50 units (shockwave). 3 charges, 0.8s cooldown. High melee DPS—at point blank, 3 hits deal 1200 pure damage to one target.
brawler.taro.description: An old man with a wrench and a mechanical backpack
brawler.taro.lore: Taro is an elderly engineer who built his first mech at six. The wrench in his hands is deadlier than a sword, and the turrets he places hold the line for hours. Never underestimate the old man.
brawler.taro.name: Taro
brawler.taro.superDesc: Taro instantly deploys a battle turret at his position: 200 HP, 250 unit detection range, fires every 0.6 sec for 150 damage to the nearest enemy (turret DPS: 250/sec). Lasts 12 seconds or until destroyed. A new turret replaces the old one. Tactic: place at a choke and attack from the other side—enemies take crossfire.
brawler.yuki.attackDesc: Yuki fires an ice orb straight for 350 units. On hit: 200 damage + instant -35% movement and fire-rate slow for 2 seconds. 3 charges, 1.0s cooldown. Three quick throws can slow 3 enemies at once—perfect for control during pushes.
brawler.yuki.description: A girl in a blue kimono with a staff and snowflake motif
brawler.yuki.lore: Yuki was born in a mountain temple where she learned the art of healing ice magic. She came to the Arena to find her brother, lost in a tournament. Until then, she heals allies and freezes anyone in her way.
brawler.yuki.name: Yuki
brawler.yuki.superDesc: Yuki releases a snow whirl—a healing cloud with 140 unit radius for 6 seconds. Allies inside restore 300 HP/sec (up to 1800 total); enemies are slowed 25%. The cloud stays in place—place it on capture points, behind cover, or under fire for maximum value.
brawler.zafkiel.attackDesc: Zafkiel uses 3 unique charges in rotation: ① Dalet (green)—projectile teleports the target to where they were 2 seconds ago, resetting momentum. ② Bet (blue)—projectile slows target -40% move and fire rate for 3 seconds. ③ Zayin (yellow)—projectile stuns for 0.6 sec (full stop). After Super, the next 3 charges are empowered: Aleph (×2 projectile speed), Gimel (poison 100 damage/sec for 3 sec), Yud (homing shot tracking nearest enemy). 1.4s cooldown, 375 unit range.
brawler.zafkiel.description: A timekeeper with pistols and an hourglass mechanism
brawler.zafkiel.lore: Zafkiel is the keeper of time and space, last of the Chronoguard order. He bends time streams, sending enemies to the past or hurrying them toward fate. His Gates of Eternity are where past and future merge in one instant. Those who stand in his way find their movements were decided long ago.
brawler.zafkiel.name: Zafkiel
brawler.zafkiel.superDesc: Zafkiel opens the Gates of Eternity—a temporal anomaly with 120 unit radius for 4 seconds. Every second, enemies inside rewind 2 seconds on their trajectory: losing position, speed, and momentum. Effectively a trap zone—enemies can't pass without cost. After activation Zafkiel gets 3 empowered charges (Aleph/Gimel/Yud), radically changing his next 3 shots.

clubs.treasury.title: Club Treasure Vault
clubs.treasury.warningBanner: While in the club, deposited resources cannot be withdrawn — only battle bonuses apply. On leave, partial refund minus commission is possible (30+ days, 5%+ contribution). No contribution = no bonuses.
clubs.treasury.pctLockedHint: This rate applies to all rewards until you save a new one (once every 7 days)
clubs.treasury.pctCooldown: You can change rate once per week
clubs.treasury.voteAlreadyActive: A vote is already in progress
clubs.treasury.voteOwnerOnly: Only the club founder can start a vote
clubs.treasury.voteAlreadyVoted: You already voted — your vote cannot be changed
clubs.treasury.infoFair1: Resources aren't lost forever: stay for battle bonuses, or leave and reclaim most of your share minus commission.
clubs.treasury.infoFair2: Staying pays off — up to +15% HP (coins), speed (gems) and damage (power points) with contributions.
clubs.treasury.infoFair3: Exit commission equals your average contribution %. It offsets bonuses used and prevents hit-and-run.
clubs.treasury.infoFair4: 30-day minimum and 5% contribution block one-day investors.
clubs.treasury.infoExampleAssumptions: Player earns ~500,000 coins, 200 gems, 1000 power points per month.
clubs.treasury.infoExampleContrib: At 15% contribution: ~75,000 coins, 30 gems, 150 PP to the fund monthly.
clubs.treasury.infoExampleTotal: After 3 months: ~225,000 coins, 90 gems, 450 PP contributed.
clubs.treasury.infoScenarioA: Scenario A (stay): up to +15% every battle — many extra wins and resources.
clubs.treasury.infoScenarioB: Scenario B (leave after 3 mo.): 225,000 coins − 15% fee ≈ 191,250 coins back.
clubs.treasury.infoConclusion: Fair system — power up in battle or reclaim most of your deposit.
clubs.treasury.infoVoteDesc: The founder starts a 3-day vote. If more than half vote yes, 50% of the fund is spent and bonuses double for 1 day. Otherwise nothing is spent.
clubs.treasury.leaveWarning: ⚠️ Club treasury rules apply when leaving.
clubs.treasury.leaveNoRefundDays: No refund: only {{days}} days in club (need {{need}}).
clubs.treasury.leaveEligibleEmpty: No deposit to refund; conditions met.

mode.boss.subtitle: Five brawlers vs one boss — no trophies per match, first-clear rewards.
mode.boss.title: Boss fight
mode.bounty.desc: 5v5. Defeat enemies and collect stars. First to 25 wins. Personal stars above each brawler (max 6).
mode.bounty.name: Star Hunt
mode.bounty.subtitle: Star hunt
mode.monsterhide.desc: 5 brawlers vs 10 monsters. They hide in bushes with teleport, speed boost, and invisibility. Kill all within 3 minutes. +15s per kill (max +60). +1 trophy per monster kill for you personally.
mode.monsterhide.name: Monster Hide
mode.monsterhide.subtitle: Monster hide
mode.monsterInvasion.desc: PvE on a Showdown-sized map: survive 10 escalating monster waves. Waves 4–6 add elite enemies (+HP, +30% damage); waves 7–10 add a mini-boss with special attacks. Trophies: −5 if you clear fewer than 3 waves, otherwise +N per wave cleared (3→+3, 10→+10). Full clear — random chest up to epic, up to 500 coins, 10 gems, and 30 power points.
mode.monsterInvasion.name: Monster Invasion
mode.monsterInvasion.subtitle: Monster invasion
mode.teamHunt.desc: PvPvE on a Showdown-sized map: four teams of three compete for 5 minutes to kill the most monsters. Normal monster — 1 point, elite (5 per minute, golden glow) — 5, boss (after 2 min, +30% attack, 30k HP, +50% size) — 10. PvP is allowed but grants no points; respawn after 10s at your team base. Power jars: 10 at start, +5 each minute; half your jars drop on death. Trophies match Showdown trio.
mode.teamHunt.name: Team Hunt
mode.teamHunt.subtitle: Team hunt
mode.monsters.subtitle: PvE battles against monsters — waves, hide-and-seek, and team fights

trophy.title: TROPHY ROAD
brawler.verdeletta.name: Verdeletta
brawler.verdeletta.description: Hell ceremony master; throws "parties" in the world of the living and invites everyone to her shadow ball
brawler.verdeletta.lore: Verdeletta is a hellish ceremony master. She organizes the most chaotic and dangerous celebrations in the underworld. Her job is to entertain sinners and demons, but she long ago stepped beyond protocol. Verdeletta throws "parties" right in the world of the living, inviting everyone without distinction. Her magic pistol is not a weapon but an invitation tool. Those she marks become guests of her shadow ball. And shadows... shadows always find those who didn't pay for entry. They say that seeing your shadow moving on its own means Verdeletta has already chosen you for the next celebration. You cannot refuse. Because this is hell.
brawler.verdeletta.attackDesc: A shot from her magic pistol is not an attack but an invitation ticket. The bullet travels ~225 units (4.5 tiles), deals 600 damage, and applies a Hell Brand for 2 sec.: a green rune flares on the target and a normal guest shadow spawns near Verdeletta (1200 HP, ranged, 350 damage). 3 charges, 1.2 sec cooldown. Super charges only from her own hits — 4 direct shots for a full charge. No more than 6 shadows on the map at once; the oldest is removed when exceeded.
brawler.verdeletta.superDesc: Verdeletta opens the main hall of the underworld and summons 3 steward shadows (4500 HP, 600 damage, ranged). They are slower than guests but stronger and hold distance, firing shadow bolts. Each shadow follows its own path and avoids stacking. If a steward kills an enemy, another steward spawns at the victim's location. Total cap — 6 shadows on the field. Shadow hits do not charge Verdeletta's super.
star.verdeletta.1.name: Endless Banquet
star.verdeletta.2.name: Sharp Heels
star.verdeletta.3.name: Dance Floor
star.verdeletta.3.effect: +20% speed for 2s when a shadow spawns.
star.verdeletta.4.name: VIP Box
star.verdeletta.5.name: Hell Jazz
star.verdeletta.5.effect: Normal shadow kill: +300 HP and 10s life.
star.verdeletta.6.name: Lord of Underworld
brawler.lumina.name: Lumina
brawler.lumina.description: Mythic girl with glowing wings; binds enemies with golden threads
brawler.lumina.lore: Lumina is the daughter of a fallen angel and a mortal woman. She does not remember heaven, but her wings glow with homesickness. They say her threads bind not only enemies but lost souls, helping them find peace. In battle she does not kill — she reconciles, locking foes in a golden cage of justice.
brawler.lumina.attackDesc: Golden chest beam: 1200 damage to first enemy at 5 tiles, then chains a second within 4 tiles — 100 DPS, max 3 tiles apart, 3 sec. 2 charges, 1.5s CD. Super: 5 hits or 3 links.
brawler.lumina.superDesc: Golden rune dome (120px, 4 sec): everyone inside is slowed 50% and cannot leave. No damage.
star.lumina.1.name: Eternal Thread
star.lumina.2.name: Rupture
star.lumina.2.effect: If enemies try to break the link, they take an extra 300 damage.
star.lumina.3.name: Grace
star.lumina.3.effect: Allies inside the dome are not slowed and gain a 200 HP shield for its duration.
star.lumina.4.name: Light in Darkness
star.lumina.5.name: Dome Lord
star.lumina.5.effect: Super lasts 5.5 seconds; dome radius increased to 150px.
star.lumina.6.name: Divine Judgment
star.lumina.6.effect: If linked enemies die, the dome explodes for 500 damage to all enemies inside.
brawler.oliver.name: Oliver
brawler.oliver.description: Boy with brown hair, round glasses, and mechanical bugs
brawler.oliver.lore: Oliver is a genius mechanic whose bronze bugs are miniature copies of his late brother turned into a machine. He learned to copy enemy supers because he believes any gift can be used for good. Yet his replicator also holds the memory of the day a bug-brother once saved his life.
brawler.oliver.attackDesc: 5 bronze bugs from his hand: each flies its own path within 5 tiles for 132 damage. Live 3 sec. 2 charges, 1.6s CD. Super: 5 hits.
brawler.oliver.superDesc: Copies the last enemy super with the same parameters. Memory persists. 22s CD.
star.oliver.1.name: Double Swarm
star.oliver.2.name: Armored Bug
star.oliver.2.effect: Bugs have 100 HP and survive one hit.
star.oliver.3.name: Expanded Memory
star.oliver.3.effect: Remembers two last supers; switch with ↻ button.
star.oliver.4.name: Fast Recharge
star.oliver.5.name: Amplification
star.oliver.6.name: Infinite Replicator
star.oliver.6.effect: After super, use the same copy again once after 5 sec.
brawler.callista.name: Callista
brawler.callista.description: Epic alchemist with green hair, converter goggles, and flasks on her belt
brawler.callista.lore: Callista is an alchemist who blew up her laboratory trying to brew a cure for every disease. Since then she wears goggles with multicolor lenses because each reactant looks different to her. Her super is an explosive mix of every recipe she has stockpiled. She does not know if it will heal or kill, but she is ready to risk it for science.
brawler.callista.attackDesc: Arc throw over 4 tiles: random effect in a 100px zone — acid 750, freeze −40% for 2s, poison 350/sec for 4s, or heal allies 800 HP. 3 charges, 1.3s CD. Super: 5 hits.
brawler.callista.superDesc: A large flask creates a 120px zone for 4 sec. with all four effects at once.
star.callista.1.name: Concentrated Acid
star.callista.2.name: Deadly Venom
star.callista.3.name: Strong Healing
star.callista.4.name: Icy Grasp
star.callista.5.name: Double Charge
star.callista.5.effect: Super can be used twice in a row; second use has half-strength effects.
star.callista.6.name: Alchemical Genius
star.callista.6.effect: Super also spawns a bonus random-effect zone within 100px.
brawler.airin.name: Airin
brawler.airin.description: Epic steampunk pilot with smoke grenades
brawler.airin.lore: Airin was a royal steampunk military pilot betrayed and left in a smoke trap. She survived and now keeps goggles on her forehead and smoke flares on her belt. Her evacuation saves bodies and souls alike — she believes everyone deserves a second chance. Even enemies.
brawler.airin.attackDesc: Arc throw up to 4.5 tiles: a metal capsule explodes into 150px smoke for 800 damage and cuts enemy vision to 2 tiles for 2 sec. 3 charges, 1.3s CD. Super charges in 6 hits.
brawler.airin.superDesc: A silver sigil flares above Airin: all living allies teleport to her from anywhere on the map and all debuffs are cleansed. Super is not spent if no allies are alive.
star.airin.1.name: Caustic Smoke
star.airin.2.name: Blinding
star.airin.2.effect: Enemies in smoke cannot see their allies.
star.airin.3.name: Evacuation+
star.airin.3.effect: Super also heals teleported allies for 800 HP.
star.airin.4.name: Smoke Screen
star.airin.5.name: Quick Reflex
star.airin.6.name: Pilot's Shadow
star.airin.6.effect: While smoke is active: invisible to enemies 2 sec (+20% speed).
brawler.elian.name: Elian
brawler.elian.description: Legendary youth in a star-studded coat
brawler.elian.lore: Elian is an observatory apprentice who learned to condense light into charges and bend gravity. The stars on his coat are not decoration — each marks a sky he has crossed. He never rushes a fight; he waits until the orb ripens, then releases catastrophe.
brawler.elian.attackDesc: Slow glowing blue orb up to 6 tiles: damage and blast radius scale with distance (500/700/1000, radius 60/70/130). 3 charges, 1.4s CD. Super charges in 4 hits.
brawler.elian.superDesc: Dark blue vortex up to 5 tiles: pulls enemies within 150px for 3 sec (2 tiles/sec), then explodes for 600 damage. Pull does not stun but hinders movement.
star.elian.1.name: Heavy Charge
star.elian.2.name: Gravity Collapse
star.elian.3.name: Star Trail
star.elian.3.effect: Orb leaves a trail: 50 damage/sec for 3 sec.
star.elian.4.name: Long Pull
star.elian.5.name: Blast Anomaly
star.elian.6.name: Black Hole
star.elian.6.effect: Kills inside the vortex spawn a chaining mini-vortex.
brawler.silven.name: Silven
brawler.silven.description: Epic forest boy with moss hair and root legs
brawler.silven.lore: Silven was an ordinary forest spirit boy until humans burned his woods. Alone, he gave his heart to an ancient oak — and the oak answered. Now Silven plants life trees wherever battle passes. They say standing under his crown, you can hear the whisper of trees long gone.
brawler.silven.attackDesc: Green ground vine up to 5 tiles: 950 damage, −30% for 1 sec. If the enemy is already slowed, roots them for 1.5 sec (can still attack). 2 charges, 1.4s CD. Super: 5 hits.
brawler.silven.superDesc: Plants a life tree up to 3 tiles away: 1000 HP, heals allies within 150px for 100 HP/sec until destroyed.
star.silven.1.name: Sturdy Roots
star.silven.2.name: Healing Grove
star.silven.3.name: Thorn Crown
star.silven.3.effect: Melee enemies attacking the tree take 150 damage.
star.silven.4.name: Endless Ivy
star.silven.5.name: Vital Moisture
star.silven.5.effect: When the tree is destroyed, allies within 200px heal 800 HP.
star.silven.6.name: Forest Spirit
star.silven.6.effect: When the tree is destroyed, a dryad spawns (800 HP, 150 damage).
brawler.vittoria.name: Vittoria
brawler.vittoria.description: Epic vampire fighter with a spiked gauntlet
brawler.vittoria.lore: Vittoria is the last of a vampire line destroyed by hunters. She wears her spiked gauntlet not to kill, but in memory of the brother who shielded her. The Blood Moon is her curse and blessing: the more lives she takes, the longer she can fight. Yet she dreams only of healing, not biting.
brawler.vittoria.attackDesc: Gauntlet lunge at 2.5 tiles: 750 damage and heals 30% of damage dealt. 3 charges, 1.1s CD. Super: 7 hits.
brawler.vittoria.superDesc: For 5s, attacks heal for 80% of damage, +23% speed and +25% damage. Eyes glow red beneath a crimson moon.
star.vittoria.1.name: Vampirism
star.vittoria.2.name: Scarlet Rain
star.vittoria.3.name: Blood Harvest
star.vittoria.4.name: Bat Bite
star.vittoria.5.name: Immortality
star.vittoria.5.effect: Kills during super extend it by 1.5s (up to 8s).
star.vittoria.6.name: Vampire Night
star.vittoria.6.effect: After super: +40% damage and +11% speed for 5s, no attack lifesteal.
brawler.octavia.name: Octavia
brawler.octavia.description: Epic mermaid-mutant with tentacles instead of legs
brawler.octavia.lore: Octavia is a mermaid-mutant from an underground lake poisoned by alchemists. Her tentacles are the result of experiments. The ink she leaves is toxic to enemies, but for allies it is like fog hiding them from danger. She seeks a way to cleanse the water, but for now her tentacle traps only grab those who do not believe in miracles.
brawler.octavia.attackDesc: Black-purple orb: 60×120px ink strip for 4s. Allies in ink are invisible to enemies (except when attacking); enemies take 100 dmg/s and −30% speed. 2 charges, 1.3s CD. Super: 5 hits.
brawler.octavia.superDesc: At target (4 tiles) pink tentacles burst from the ground: 100px zone, 1.5s root and 600 damage on capture. Zone lasts 3s with no new captures.
star.octavia.1.name: Caustic Ink
star.octavia.2.name: Long Veil
star.octavia.3.name: Killer Tentacles
star.octavia.4.name: Blinding Ink
star.octavia.4.effect: Enemies in ink see only 1.5 tiles.
star.octavia.5.name: Second Trap
star.octavia.5.effect: Super creates a zone twice as large.
star.octavia.6.name: Deep Dread
star.octavia.6.effect: Capture holds 1s longer and deals 200 dmg/s.
brawler.zephyrin.name: Zephyrin
brawler.zephyrin.description: Legendary wind girl in a semi-transparent dress
brawler.zephyrin.lore: Zephyrin is a wind spirit tired of being invisible. She took the form of a girl to feel what vulnerability means. Her tornadoes are attempts to embrace the world, yet they push enemies away. In moments of invulnerability she becomes pure air, unreachable by others' pain. She seeks someone who can stop her wind.
brawler.zephyrin.attackDesc: A gray-white tornado travels straight up to 5 tiles: 900 damage and knocks enemies back 2 tiles. Passes through enemies. 3 charges, 1.2s CD. Super: 5 hits.
brawler.zephyrin.superDesc: For 4s, fully immune to damage and effects but cannot attack or use super. +50% move speed. Star effects trigger after it ends.
star.zephyrin.1.name: Hurricane
star.zephyrin.2.name: Swift Wind
star.zephyrin.3.name: Recovery
star.zephyrin.3.effect: After super ends, Zephyrin heals 700 HP.
star.zephyrin.4.name: Cold Whirlwind
star.zephyrin.4.effect: Tornado slows enemies by 30% for 1 second.
star.zephyrin.5.name: Endless Breeze
star.zephyrin.6.name: Storm Gust
star.zephyrin.6.effect: After super, fires three tornadoes in different directions.
brawler.mirabel.name: Mirabel
brawler.mirabel.description: Rare girl with a magic book; knowledge sparks speed up allies
brawler.mirabel.lore: Mirabel grew up in the academy library where every book whispered secrets. She does not shoot fire — she throws sparks of knowledge, speeding allies before enemies understand what happened. Her Accelerated Learning super turns the whole team into masters whose next strikes come twice.
brawler.mirabel.attackDesc: Yellow spark from her book, 4.5 tiles: 950 damage. Allies within 100px of the hit enemy get −0.3s attack CD. 3 charges, 1.2s. Super: 6 hits.
brawler.mirabel.superDesc: Glowing book over allies within 500px for 5s: each one's next attack is doubled, consumed after firing.
star.mirabel.1.name: Strong Spark
star.mirabel.2.name: Ally Acceleration
star.mirabel.3.name: Expanded Radius
star.mirabel.3.effect: Super radius covers the whole map.
star.mirabel.4.name: Double Lesson
star.mirabel.4.effect: Buff lasts for two attacks (two double volleys).
star.mirabel.5.name: Inspiration
star.mirabel.6.name: Tome of Wisdom
